intro: In the midst of their lively school days, three high school girls and one female teacher must contend with confused emotions and harbored LIES...
description:
With brilliant visuals by Shio-Koji and a story composed by Akeo, the yuri visual novel "UsoNatsu -The Summer Romance Bloomed From A Lie-" is coming to Nintendo Switch™!
2D animation gives the girls a perky liveliness as their engrossing romance is brought to you fully voiced!

2D animations create a more immersive story!
Details such as hand gestures and flowing hair are expressed in the 2D animations, granting the characters more realism and depth of emotion.

Includes the full version of the opening theme!
The full version of the opening theme, "sun shade", is included.
It becomes accessible from the MUSIC option in the main menu after finishing the story.

Playable in three languages!
The text can be set to English, Simplified Chinese, or Japanese (audio is in Japanese only).
This includes in-game text, options, and the digital manual. Language settings can be changed at any time."

Enjoy full HD visuals!
Experience the game in high-definition 1920x1080 resolution by playing in TV Mode.

Touch screen controls and Nintendo Switch Lite are also supported.

Game System
There are no choice-based story branching elements in this visual novel.
You simply watch the story unfold like turning the pages of a book or enjoying an anime or movie.

Story
One night, Tachibana Kaoru, a second-year student at Aoba Dai-ichi High School in Minatocho, confesses her love to her middle school homeroom teacher, Shimotsuki Mirei, only to have her heart broken.
To make matters worse, the moment is witnessed by Minagi Shiori, a diligent classmate of Kaoru's and a model student.
On the brink of despair, Kaoru confides in Shiori about her painful past with Mirei.
Shiori listens silently and then enigmatically posits a peculiar question:
"Instead of forgetting someone you cared about... do you think it's possible to simply overwrite those memories with different ones?"
As their relationship blossoms, Inohara Riku—another student in the same grade and secret admirer of Shiori—also becomes involved, and the three begin to weave the tale of their summer together...

Staff
Original Art: Shio-Koji
Scenario: Akeo

Cast
Tachibana Kaoru    VA: Koichi Makoto
Minagi Shiori    VA: Iwami Manaka
Inohara Riku   VA: Fujimura Konomi
Shimotsuki Mirei    VA: Matsui Eriko
Asahi Kayo    VA: Shibasaki Noriko
Tachibana Koharu   VA: Makita Tsugumi
Tachibana Atsushi   VA: Kageura Daisuke
Minagi Naomasa   VA: Watanabe Hiroshi
*Fully voiced (including the protagonist)
